Operation 'graphqlQuery' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, missing_input_details. The current description lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Added: (1) explicit authentication requirement (bearer token), (2) input structure details (query string and variables), (3) output structure (data and errors fields), (4) side effects of mutations (state changes including create/update/delete operations). data.current_description: Execute any DG1 GraphQL query or mutation. Operations include queries for products, pages, contacts, orders, bookings, users, sites, and mutations for creating/updating/deleting all entities.
data.description_suggestion: Executes GraphQL queries and mutations against the DG1 digital experience management system. Supports queries for products, pages, contacts, orders, bookings, users, and sites; and mutations for creating, updating, or deleting entities. Requires bearer token authentication. Accepts a GraphQL request object containing the query/mutation string and optional variables. Returns a GraphQL response with data and/or errors. Mutations may modify backend state including creating new records, updating existing records, or removing records.
